summary_markdown:
```markdown
## What this issue is about
This issue (PLIP 4303) focuses on improving the user experience of adding links to internal content or external URLs in Plone. The goal is to unify the link-adding process across different components, providing a more seamless experience akin to those seen in other popular platforms.

## What needs to be done
We need to design a new link widget with the following features:
- Define the default elements to display (e.g., recent user-created content).
- Implement inline searching for links.
- Include options to save, edit, and remove links.
- Address any edge cases that may arise.

## Helpful background
This is a proposed improvement, not a bug to fix. It requires discussion, review, and approval from the project team. The idea has gained traction due to its relevance and appeal in modern software such as Google products and WordPress.

## Good first steps
1. Familiarize yourself with [PLIP guidelines](https://5.docs.plone.org/develop/coredev/docs/plips.html).
2. Review existing comments and suggestions in this issue.
3. Consider contributing to discussions about the default elements to show and how links might be handled.
4. If you're interested in coding, start by looking at related pull requests and testing improvements.
5. Reach out to the current assignee, @dobri1408, for guidance on how you can help move this forward.
```
